description: Maps ranked evidence-gap failure families to bounded candidate-overlay experiment templates. These templates are research/shadow only and do not grant runtime authority.

data_coverage_gap.selection_goal: Prove the selected training window has raw, Parquet, SQL, and feature coverage before strategy comparisons are trusted.

templates.title: Reconcile training-window data coverage
templates.hypothesis: If raw, Parquet, SQL, or feature-day counts disagree, the next learning batch must repair coverage before tuning strategy, policy, or risk.

feature_materialization_gap.selection_goal: Separate missing or stale features from downstream condition, policy, or strategy failures.

templates.title: Audit feature coverage and null-rate health
templates.hypothesis: If feature materialization is incomplete or null-heavy, candidate generation failures may be downstream symptoms rather than strategy failures.

condition_churn_or_staleness.selection_goal: Test whether condition/regime state is stale, unavailable, or flipping too aggressively before changing strategy logic.

templates.title: Audit condition staleness and regime churn
templates.hypothesis: If valid features do not produce stable conditions, the strategy layer is being asked to trade without a trustworthy regime context.

strategy_runtime_mismatch.selection_goal: Test whether paper runtime is blocked because strategy candidates are incompatible with the currently observed long-friendly regime.

templates.title: Enable a long-compatible strategy-policy overlay in shadow
templates.hypothesis: If long-friendly regimes are repeatedly producing flat/no-trade runtime targets, a bounded long-compatible strategy-policy overlay should create comparable paper candidates without bypassing risk.

templates.title: Isolate whether anomaly vetoes are suppressing long candidates
templates.hypothesis: If the candidate detector can find long-compatible setups only when anomaly veto sensitivity is relaxed in shadow, the next test should focus on risk/policy overblocking rather than strategy discovery.

templates.title: Falsify dead-candidate generator with always-candidate sanity lane
templates.hypothesis: If an always-candidate long sanity overlay still produces no candidates, the failure is below policy selection and belongs in candidate generation or data wiring.

candidate_generation_failure.selection_goal: Prove the strategy detector can emit candidates before tuning policy or risk.

templates.title: Run an always-candidate baseline
templates.hypothesis: A diagnostic always-candidate lane should create opportunity rows if the runtime wiring is intact.

policy_overblocking.selection_goal: Separate true policy ineligibility from overly conservative strategy-regime mapping.

templates.title: Break down policy block reasons
templates.hypothesis: If strategy candidates exist but policy blocks dominate, the next test should inspect strategy eligibility mapping before risk or source changes.

risk_overblocking.selection_goal: Separate true unsafe risk rejects from missing data or stale quote failures.

templates.title: Break down risk rejection reasons
templates.hypothesis: A typed risk rejection histogram should show whether risk is overblocking or correctly vetoing unsafe setups.

quote_fill_unavailability.selection_goal: Separate executable quote availability from strategy quality.

templates.title: Audit quote availability and staleness
templates.hypothesis: If quote gaps dominate no-trade decisions, source freshness must be repaired before strategy comparisons matter.

settlement_feedback_gap.selection_goal: Prove paper fills and exits settle into feedback rows before treating paper results as learning evidence.

templates.title: Audit paper settlement feedback continuity
templates.hypothesis: If paper sessions fill but do not settle into evidence feedback, the learning loop cannot adapt safely from paper results.

proposal_not_converted_to_test.selection_goal: Convert accumulated advisory proposals into a small comparable test batch instead of generating more untested artifacts.

templates.title: Build a comparable-test backlog from existing proposals
templates.hypothesis: If proposals accumulate without challenger reports or paper evidence, the next useful move is comparison pressure rather than more proposal generation.
